meta.changelog_1_1_0: Discovery map↔list UX: split/list-only/map-first modes, selection sync, bottom sheet snaps, cross-surface parity (search/saved); flow discovery_map_list_elegant.
meta.changelog_1_2_0: Premium UX contracts added: responsive behavior, visual design principles, motion system, feedback states, and explicit interaction sequencing for split vs single-pane discovery.
meta.changelog_1_3_0: Implementation foundation added: Expo-first runtime policy, navigation/state/styling recommendations, gesture/motion stack, list/map performance guidance, backend contract alignment, and boilerplate policy.
meta.ssot_policy: Extend in place; do not rename page_id or flow_id once shipped to clients.

landing_page.name: Landing
landing_page.description: Primary discovery: Airbnb/Booking-style map↔list coupling—split (map + draggable sheet/list), optional list-only (map hidden), or map-first expand. Selection syncs pin↔card when both visible; mobile prioritizes direct navigation to detail to reduce chrome. Progressive disclosure so map-averse users stay in list.

sections.name: map_region
sections.description: Partial-height map; hidden or minimal chrome in list-only mode; same dataset as list.

sections.name: search_controls
sections.description: Search field, filter, horizontal mode icons; optional compact view-mode control (map / split / list).

sections.name: discovery_sheet
sections.description: Draggable bottom sheet (mobile/tablet) or fixed split pane (desktop) listing cards; height sets map/list balance.

sections.name: feed
sections.description: Scrollable listing cards; in split mode scroll-syncs with map selection.

ui_elements.label: Map / Split / List
ui_elements.description: Low-friction segmented control or overflow: list-only for users who prefer no map; split default on tablet/desktop; map-first optional.

ui_elements.label: Map
ui_elements.description: Clustered pins (job vs worker). Tap pin: in split/peek → highlight list row + optional preview; on narrow mobile → open detail or expand preview sheet first.

ui_elements.label: Sheet handle
ui_elements.description: Drag to resize map vs list (Uber/Airbnb-style); snap points (collapsed peek, half, full list).

ui_elements.label: Listing
ui_elements.description: Title, rate, rating, image, heart. Web+split: hover highlights pin; click selects + syncs map; second activation or explicit CTA opens detail. Narrow mobile: tap → job_description or worker_description.

actions.description: Desktop hover/focus or split-view first tap selects card and highlights corresponding pin
Single-pane mobile tap or explicit open CTA on selected job card
Single-pane mobile tap or explicit open CTA on selected worker card

ui_elements.label: Account
ui_elements.description: Profile or menu per wireframe variants.

map_view.name: Map fullscreen
map_view.description: Map-first discovery (Airbnb map search / Booking map results): fullscreen canvas with floating search/filter; bottom sheet or side carousel of cards tied to pins. Pin tap selects card and recenters; card tap highlights pin; on small screens pin tap may open detail directly or open sheet at mid snap with preview.

sections.name: map_canvas
sections.description: Pins, clustering, price/distance callouts, user location.

sections.name: results_sheet
sections.description: Horizontal card carousel and/or vertical list peek synced to map selection.

sections.name: fab_list
sections.description: Switch to list-primary or collapse map.

ui_elements.label: Pin
ui_elements.description: Selected state visually linked to card. Tap: sync selection to sheet/list; optional detail on second tap or narrow breakpoint.

actions.description: First tap selects pin, recenters map if needed, and highlights matching sheet/list card
Second tap, explicit preview CTA, or narrow mobile behavior for worker pin
Second tap, explicit preview CTA, or narrow mobile behavior for job pin

ui_elements.label: Sheet listing card
ui_elements.description: Carousel item tied to pin; tap highlights pin and recenters map.

actions.description: First tap selects card, highlights pin, and recenters map
Second tap or explicit open CTA for worker
Second tap or explicit open CTA for job

search_screen.name: Search
search_screen.description: Query, trending chips, results; keyboard; map FAB. When map FAB opens map_view, same selection-sync rules as landing (shared discovery_map_list_ux).

ui_elements.label: Result
ui_elements.description: Same hover/select/detail behavior as landing when parent shows map split (web); otherwise tap → detail.

actions.description: When split/map visible, first activation selects and syncs
Single-pane mobile tap or explicit open CTA
Single-pane mobile tap or explicit open CTA

search_results.name: Search results
search_results.description: Refined list; active filter affordance; map FAB. Optional inline map strip on large breakpoints (same sync token as landing).

sections.name: optional_map_strip
sections.description: Web/tablet: thin map or toggle without overwhelming list-preference users.

ui_elements.label: Result
ui_elements.description: Selection sync when map strip or map_view active.

discovery_filter.name: Discovery filters
discovery_filter.description: Category, rating, location, distance, price mode/range, repetition, remote, schedule, actor type, sort; apply/reset.

options_menu.name: Options menu
options_menu.description: Drawer: categories, saved, membership, auth, followed users, history, imprint, logout.

worker_description.name: Worker detail
worker_description.description: Gallery carousel, headline metrics, bio, Request + Chat; report via info.

sections.name: summary
sections.description: Title, distance, rate, rating, avatar, favorite.

job_description.name: Job detail
job_description.description: Job post detail: carousel, poster avatar → profile, Apply/Counter-offer, Chat; owner overflow menu.

sections.name: summary
sections.description: Title, favorite, distance, pay, rating, poster.

offer_service.name: Offer service
offer_service.description: Worker chooses how to apply: private offer, create service, or pick existing service profile.

send_help_request_to_worker.name: Send help request to worker
send_help_request_to_worker.description: Customer creates new demand or attaches existing post to worker.

confirmation_worker_offer_submitted.name: Confirmation (offer sent)
confirmation_worker_offer_submitted.description: Success copy after worker notifies poster.

requests_posts_hub.name: Requests & Posts
requests_posts_hub.description: Tabbed hub: Requests (applications/inbound) vs Posts (owned listings); category row + filter; settings on Posts.

sections.name: list
sections.description: Status cards, applicant/offer counts, message badges.

ui_elements.label: Settings
ui_elements.description: Posts tab: enter manage mode per wireframe.

applicants_list.name: Applicants list
applicants_list.description: Poster reviews applicants for a job: status labels, filter.

ui_elements.label: Applicant
ui_elements.description: Avatar, name, rating, status, new messages.

chat_offer_review.name: Chat & offer review
chat_offer_review.description: Thread with negotiation overlay: accept / counter / decline proposed rate.

chat_thread.name: Chat thread
chat_thread.description: Generic 1:1 conversation shell (referenced from multiple entry points).

post_type_selector.name: Post type selector
post_type_selector.description: Choose Demand (help) vs Offer (service) after + tab.

worker_service_form.name: Worker service form
worker_service_form.description: Multi-step publish flow: media, title, description, pay (per hour/fixed), category, keywords, location+distance; optional schedule, onsite/remote, documents; confirm.

sections.name: header
sections.description: Back; upload photos; use profile picture.

sections.name: core_fields
sections.description: Title, description, salary, category, keywords, location slider.

help_request_form.name: Help request form
help_request_form.description: Multi-step customer post: media, title, description, pay + currency, category, keywords, location; optional schedule, professional/reputation, remote, attachments; post CTA.

user_profile_external.name: User profile (external)
user_profile_external.description: Public profile: verifications, about, skills, documents, gallery; tasks/tasker toggle; posted jobs & offered services CTAs; report via header info when applicable.

user_reviews.name: User reviews
user_reviews.description: Chronological reviews with job context, stars, text, per-review media; filter; add review CTA.

review_filter.name: Review filter
review_filter.description: Min/max rating sliders + sort for review list.

user_posted_jobs_list.name: User posted jobs
user_posted_jobs_list.description: List of jobs posted by profile subject; header filter opens discovery_filter variant.

decline_rating.name: Cannot rate
decline_rating.description: Explains rating allowed only after hire.

add_review_form.name: Add review
add_review_form.description: Pick completed job/service, multi-criteria stars, comment, photo upload, submit.

account_profile.name: My profile
account_profile.description: Own profile: empty vs filled states; tap-to-edit fields; photo add/edit; settings gear; verification rows → phone flow.

signup_gate.name: Sign up gate
signup_gate.description: OAuth primary (Google, Apple, Facebook) + link to manual signup + login.

signup_form.name: Sign up form
signup_form.description: Manual registration: names, username, password, birthday, email, optional phone, terms checkbox.

login_form.name: Login
login_form.description: Username/password, forgot password link, signup CTA.

account_settings.name: Account settings
account_settings.description: Hub: profile edit, password, deactivate, data export request, payment methods.

account_info_edit.name: Edit account info
account_info_edit.description: First/last name, username (restricted), birthday (restricted), email, phone.

deactivate_account.name: Deactivate account
deactivate_account.description: Explains hiding profile/content until login; confirm CTA → landing.

payment_cards_list.name: Saved cards
payment_cards_list.description: Masked list with status labels; manage CTA.

saved_posts.name: Saved posts
saved_posts.description: Heart-filled cards; same category toggles + filter as landing. Optional map FAB to see saved items on map (subset of discovery_map_list_ux); default remains calm list-first.

sections.name: fab_map
sections.description: Optional; opens map_view filtered to saved IDs.

ui_elements.label: Saved listing
ui_elements.description: Filled heart; same select→pin sync when map visible.

membership_status.name: Membership status
membership_status.description: Shows current tier (Free/Pro); upgrade CTA; Pro shows cancel below fold.

membership_plans.name: Membership plans
membership_plans.description: Horizontally swiped plan cards, trial + price, pagination dots.

membership_cancel_confirm.name: Cancel subscription confirm
membership_cancel_confirm.description: Modal confirms loss of benefits after date.

report_confirmation.name: Report confirmation
report_confirmation.description: Thanks + investigation promise; return to discovery.

phone_verification.name: Phone verification
phone_verification.description: SMS code entry (6 boxes) + submit → profile refresh.

notifications_list.name: Notifications
notifications_list.description: List of proximity, request, matching, reminder alerts; items route to map, requests hub, or threads.

post_actions_sheet.name: Post actions
post_actions_sheet.description: Bottom sheet: delete, edit, hide, cancel.

delete_post_confirmation.name: Delete post confirmation
delete_post_confirmation.description: Destructive confirm; on confirm pop to posts list without item.

followed_users_list.name: Followed users
followed_users_list.description: Rows with Followed chip → unfollow modal; row opens profile.

apply_to_job.name: Worker applies to job
apply_to_job.description: Discover job → detail → choose offer path → confirmation → activity hub.

request_worker_direct.name: Customer requests worker
request_worker_direct.description: Pick worker → request → new or existing demand → confirmation.

steps.action: Create new or pick existing + send

post_service_profile.name: Publish service profile
post_service_profile.description: + → Offer service → form → confirmation → posts tab.

map_gallery_discovery.name: Map → detail → gallery
map_gallery_discovery.description: Expanded map browsing with gallery detour.

discovery_map_list_elegant.name: Map ↔ list discovery (Uber / Airbnb / Booking patterns)
discovery_map_list_elegant.description: Single selected listing_id ties map pin and list/sheet row. Web split: hover list → highlight pin; click list → select + pan/zoom pin; click pin → select row + scroll list. Mobile split (sheet): tap pin → snap sheet + highlight row; tap row → highlight pin; tap again or CTA → detail. Mobile narrow: often skip dual-pane—tap row or pin → detail. List-only mode hides map; preference persisted. Sheet drag snaps reduce overwhelm.

steps.action: Set view mode (split / list / map) or drag sheet
Hover or focus list card (web) / tap select (split tablet)
steps.result: Corresponding pin highlighted and map panned if needed

steps.action: Tap pin when map+list both visible

branches.condition: Mobile or list-only: tap listing or pin opens detail directly
Map-first fullscreen: pin/card then worker detail

search_map_loop.name: Search ↔ map loop
search_map_loop.description: Typed search, filters, sort modal, refined results, map FAB.

trust_deep_dive_job.name: Job → poster profile → reviews → review filter

poster_catalog.name: Profile → posted jobs → filters
poster_catalog.description: Inspect everything a user has posted.

messaging_applicants.name: Review applicants & negotiate
messaging_applicants.description: Hub → applicant list → threaded chat w/ offer decisions.

report_user_or_listing.name: Report unsafe content
report_user_or_listing.description: Info icon → reason → details → ack → home.

signup_email_path.name: Register (email verification path)
signup_email_path.description: Menu/account → signup gate → manual form → verification pending.

steps.action: Open account tab or protected tab

signup_oauth_path.name: Register / login via OAuth
signup_oauth_path.description: OAuth → optional profile completion splash → landing.

login_password.name: Login (password)
login_password.description: Menu sign in → credentials → splash → home.

edit_own_profile.name: Edit own profile
edit_own_profile.description: Navigate to profile, fill sections inline, optional settings.

verify_phone.name: Verify phone from profile
verify_phone.description: Tap phone row → OTP → updated badges.

account_settings_deep.name: Account settings & payments
account_settings_deep.description: Info edit, password, deactivate, add/manage cards.

membership_cancel.name: Cancel membership
membership_cancel.description: Pro status → hidden cancel → confirm → free tier.

delete_post.name: Delete post
delete_post.description: Posts tab → overflow / gear mode → sheet → confirm.

bottom_navigation.guest_behavior: Protected tabs (messages, post, notifications) route to signup_gate; account may open options_menu per product variant.

discovery_map_list_ux.intent: Match expectations set by Airbnb (map + bottom sheet + carousel), Booking.com (list/map toggle, calm defaults), Uber (map-first with minimal chrome)—adapted for jobs + job seekers without visual noise.

view_modes.split: Map + draggable sheet or side-by-side list (responsive); default for tablet/desktop web.
view_modes.map_first: Fullscreen map_view with results sheet; optional expand from landing.
view_modes.list_only: Map hidden; same filters/search; reduces cognitive load for map-averse users; persist in user_preferences.

selection_sync.shared_state: selected_listing_id (or job_id/worker_listing_id) binds pin, list row, and carousel card.
selection_sync.web_pointer_hover: Hover/focus list row → transient pin highlight (no navigation).
selection_sync.web_pointer_click: Click row → selected pin + pan/zoom map to pin; second click or View opens detail.
selection_sync.touch_split_layout: Tap row ↔ tap pin: symmetric select + scroll-into-view; opening detail explicit (row tap uses short delay or visible Open button if ambiguous).
selection_sync.touch_single_pane: No simultaneous map+list: tap row or pin → navigate to job_description or worker_description (current SSOT default on narrow mobile).

bottom_sheet.gesture: Drag handle; rubber-band at extremes; respects reduced-motion settings.
bottom_sheet.carousel: Horizontal cards above vertical list optional; selected card centered when pin tapped.

calm_defaults.first_visit: Split or modest map height—not fullscreen map wall.
calm_defaults.copy_and_density: Limit simultaneous UI (avoid map + full list + filters + tutorial).
calm_defaults.progressive: Map FAB and view-mode toggle available but secondary to primary search/list.

accessibility.keyboard: Arrow through list updates aria-selected and map focus marker.
accessibility.screen_reader: Announce selection link between list item and map pin.

breakpoint_strategy.mobile_compact: Prefer single-pane or map + bottom-sheet. Primary tap usually opens detail quickly.
breakpoint_strategy.tablet: Default to split discovery with draggable sheet and persistent map context.
breakpoint_strategy.desktop_web: Allow simultaneous map + list; hover/focus may preview selection without navigation.

layout_rules: Persist preferred discovery mode per user when reasonable
Do not force fullscreen map on first visit
Reduce secondary chrome when keyboard is open or sheet is expanded

discovery_surface.cards: Rounded, elevated, image-led cards with concise metadata and one obvious primary action.
discovery_surface.map_overlays: Glass or elevated compact controls that preserve map readability.
discovery_surface.selection: Selected pin and selected card share a distinct accent state.

content_density.default: Show only information needed for scanning: title, price/rate, rating, distance if relevant.
content_density.avoid: Crowding cards with too many badges, toggles, or secondary actions.

discovery_examples.loading: Skeleton cards and deferred pin rendering until enough data is ready.
discovery_examples.empty: Friendly copy plus nearby suggestions, broader radius, or reset filters CTA.
discovery_examples.error: Inline retry state that does not eject the user from discovery context.

discovery_selection_order.web_split: Hover/focus previews. Click selects. Explicit CTA or second activation opens detail.
discovery_selection_order.touch_split: First tap selects and syncs. Explicit CTA or second tap opens detail.
discovery_selection_order.touch_single_pane: Tap opens detail directly unless a preview sheet is already active.

non_overwhelm_rules: only one dominant discovery control cluster visible at a time
list_only_mode remains a first-class path, not a degraded fallback

runtime.react_native_policy: Track latest stable React Native supported by the selected Expo SDK rather than pinning SSOT behavior to a specific RN minor.

navigation.reason: File-based routing maps cleanly to SSOT page_ids, supports web/deep-link parity, and keeps navigation structure explicit.

alternative.use_when: Team prefers central imperative route config over file-based routing.

server_state.reason: Caching, background refresh, pagination, optimistic updates, and request lifecycle control for jobs, workers, messages, notifications, and memberships.

client_ui_state.reason: Lightweight state for session-adjacent UI concerns like selected_listing_id, discovery mode, bottom-sheet snap state, and local preferences.

form_state.reason: Efficient large forms for posting, account editing, payments, and reviews.

nativewind_policy.reason: Utility-first styling can be used if the team is already strong with it, but it should not define architecture or replace a tokenized design system.

gesture_and_motion.reason: Core to map/list sync, sheets, drawers, swipe interactions, and premium motion.

lists_and_performance.reason: Large feeds, applicant lists, notification streams, and saved results require predictable performance.

boilerplate_policy.reason: The SSOT already provides strong product structure; a thin custom foundation keeps the stack intentional for maps, web, and premium UX.

acceptable_reference.use_when: Team wants a battle-tested starter with conventions and generators and accepts its opinions.

category_mode_selector.description: Three-icon control reused on landing, saved, map overlay, activity hub.

design_notes_from_wireframes.posts_tab_semantics: Applicants map to inbound interest on customer job posts; Work Offers map to inbound interest on worker service posts.
design_notes_from_wireframes.instagram_style_profile_editing: Tap fields directly instead of ubiquitous pencil icons after onboarding.
design_notes_from_wireframes.membership_cancel_discoverability: Cancel subscription should require scrolling; avoid prominent churn CTA.
design_notes_from_wireframes.map_list_reference_apps: Product map/list behavior should benchmark Airbnb (sheet + map sync), Booking (list/map switch, understated map), Uber (map-primary clarity)—not clone, but meet the same mental model.
